name: away_occupancy_override_cleared
description: Leaving home with an active manual override: override should be cleared on occupancy-away transition
notes: Before Issue #220 fix, handle_occupancy_away() did not call clear_manual_override().
A manual override set while home would persist into away mode, causing the system to skip
setback application on every subsequent classification cycle until the user returned.
The occupancy_change_with_override event type sets manual_override_active=True then
transitions to away — this simulates a user who overrode the thermostat just before leaving.
This scenario FAILS before the fix and passes after.

events.note: Morning classification — warm day, HVAC off
User leaves home with an active manual override (e.g. bumped thermostat before leaving). Override must be cleared on away transition.

assertions.reason: Leaving home should clear any active manual override so classification cycles apply setback correctly while away

verdict.summary: Away occupancy transition clears manual_override_active flag
verdict.observed_behavior: FAILS before fix: manual_override_active remains True after away transition; override_cleared assertion returns False
verdict.expected_behavior: override_cleared passes: manual_override_active=False after occupancy_change_with_override to away
